_comment: DEMO BRANCH ONLY. Full 20-drug curated adult PK dossiers for offline demos. When a drug is listed here, retrieve_drug_data serves this JSON (source_mode=demo) and skips live PubMed/openFDA. Never merge demo → master.
_selection: All 20 drugs from the validation harness (validation_set/drug_data.json), re-homed for demo.

citations.claim: Curated adult PK for demo (vancomycin): CL=4.2 L/h, Vd=49.0 L, fm={'renal_gfr': 0.9}
citations.source: PaedScale demo pack (reviewed validation seed; not live PubMed/openFDA)

vancomycin.confidence: demo pack — curated offline PK + guidelines; skip live retrieval for speed

engine_limitation.explanation: Fluconazole weight-normalised clearance in infants and children EXCEEDS adult allometric scaling (children eliminate it faster per kg than WT^0.75 predicts). The linear allometry×maturation engine therefore UNDER-doses pediatric patients here. Treat the computed dose as directional only — pediatric guidelines use higher mg/kg than this extrapolation.

engine_limitation.explanation: Phenytoin follows saturable Michaelis–Menten (zero-order-approaching) elimination, not first-order clearance. The linear allometry×maturation engine assumes CL is dose-independent, so its steady-state prediction OVER-predicts exposure as dose rises — a real over-dose risk for this narrow-TI drug. The computed value is directional only; dose to TDM.
